aion2Home.noEvents: No official events are available right now.
aion2Home.meterRunningNotification: DPS meter is running. Switch to the game window to view.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance and language of the app
appearance.themeDesc: Choose light, dark, or system appearance and keep app windows in sync.
appearance.languageDesc: Switch the interface language and sync it to the tray menu and newly opened windows.

aion2.title: Aion 2
aion2.description: DPS meter and overlay settings for Aion 2
aion2.shortcutShowDpsOverlayDesc: Toggle the DPS overlay on and off
aion2.shortcutToggleLockDesc: Toggle overlay click-through and hide title bar
aion2.overlayLockedDesc: Hides the title bar and lets mouse input pass through the DPS panel. Unlock from settings or with the shortcut.
aion2.overlayAlwaysOnTopDesc: Keeps the DPS panel visible even when Aion2 loses focus, useful for multi-monitor or streaming setups.
aion2.overlayContentScaleDesc: Scales only the DPS list and bottom status bar. The window height is recalculated from the scaled content.
aion2.overlayBackgroundOpacityDesc: Adjusts the content background opacity. Lower values make the panel closer to transparent.
aion2.overlayMainPlayerColorDesc: Color used for your own damage bar. Opacity controls how strong the bar background appears.
aion2.overlayOtherPlayerColorDesc: Color used for other players' damage bars. Pick a color distinct from your own.
aion2.overlayShowPlayerNameDesc: When disabled, player names are hidden while icons, damage and stats remain visible.
aion2.overlayShowServerDesc: Controls the server label after each player name. Disable it for a more compact list.
aion2.overlayShowDamageDesc: Controls whether accumulated damage is shown on each row. It does not affect DPS or percentage calculations.
aion2.overlayShowDpsDesc: Controls whether realtime DPS is shown on each row. Disable it to reduce right-side information density.
aion2.overlayPctModeDesc: Contribution is based on the visible list. Share is based on the full combat total.
aion2.overlayHideUnknownPlayersDesc: Hides players whose character names were not identified, keeping the list focused on known actors.
aion2.overlayDetailWindowModeDesc: When clicking a player for skill details, the window can follow the overlay or be centered on screen.
aion2.buffMonitorEnabledDesc: When enabled, opening the DPS overlay also opens the buff monitor window. Disabling it only stops automatic creation and does not affect DPS tracking.
aion2.buffMonitorShowOnlyActiveDesc: When enabled, click-through mode only shows active buff icons. Editing and non-click-through modes still show the full layout.
aion2.buffMonitorIconStyleDesc: Controls icon appearance in the buff monitor window and preview.
aion2.buffMonitorSelfBuffsDesc: Manage player buff skills shown in the buff monitor for the selected class.
aion2.buffMonitorBossDebuffsDesc: Manage boss debuff skills watched by the selected class.
aion2.buffMonitorIconSizeDesc: Controls icon size in the buff monitor window and preview.
aion2.buffMonitorIconGapDesc: Controls horizontal and vertical spacing between buff icons.
aion2.buffMonitorExportCopied: Copied the buff layout token for {{actorClass}}.
aion2.buffMonitorExportCopyFailed: Failed to copy the layout token. Check clipboard permission and try again.
aion2.buffMonitorImportDesc: Importing will overwrite the current {{targetClass}} layout.
aion2.buffMonitorImportPlaceholder: Paste a layout token starting with NOIA-BUFF-V1
aion2.buffMonitorImportOverwriteWarning: This token is from {{sourceClass}}. Confirming will overwrite the current {{targetClass}} layout.
aion2.buffMonitorImportInvalid: This layout token cannot be recognized.
aion2.buffMonitorStorageDesc: The layout still uses the old aion2-buff-monitor-layout:v1 localStorage field, so settings and the buff window read the same data.
aion2.overlayDamageFormatDesc: Large number display: w/e (Chinese convention) or K/M/B (English convention).
aion2.overlayMaxPlayerCountDesc: Maximum number of players to display, range 5-20. Extra players will not be shown.
aion2.overlayAutoResizeHeightDesc: Automatically adjusts the overlay height based on player count. Disable to keep a fixed height.
aion2.autoHideEnabledDesc: Shows the DPS panel only while Aion2 or a related overlay window is focused.
aion2.captureBackendPriorityDesc: Choose which capture backend is tried first when starting DPS. If the preferred backend is unavailable, the other one is used as fallback.
aion2.bossOnlyDesc: Only record damage against boss monsters
aion2.showPossibleBossDesc: Treats very high-HP monsters that are not in the known boss table as temporary bosses. Useful for new dungeons or missing name data.
aion2.pvpModeOnDesc: Also records damage against players. Can be used together with Boss only.
aion2.pvpOverlayPositionDesc: Bottom and right follow the meter window. Free mode can be dragged separately.
aion2.myMuzhuangOnlyDesc: Only record damage from your own Muzhuang
aion2.dpsSnapshotIntervalDesc: Controls how often DPS data refreshes. Shorter intervals feel more realtime with slightly more overhead.
aion2.maxPacketSizeThresholdDesc: Ignores unusually large packets to reduce parser errors or noisy records.
aion2.stallResyncDelayDesc: Only affects the nickname detection stream. When a nickname frame looks incomplete, this controls how long to wait before resyncing by one byte.
aion2.fullProcessorStallResyncDelayDesc: Wait time after the full parser stalls. Set to 0 to resync by one byte immediately.

signIn.linkText: Already have an account? Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in to your account to sync your profile and membership status.

signUp.linkText: Don't have an account? Sign up
signUp.confirmationText: Registration successful. Check your email and open the link on this device to complete verification.
signUp.description: Create a new account to unlock cloud-based features later.

forgottenPassword.confirmationText: Check your email and open the reset link on this device.
forgottenPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.

magicLink.confirmationText: Check your email for the magic link.

updatePassword.confirmationText: Your password has been updated successfully.
updatePassword.description: Set a new password to complete account recovery.

feedback.deepLinkFailed: Failed to process the email link. Please try again.
feedback.recoveryReady: Verification complete. You can now set a new password.
feedback.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect, or the email has not been verified yet.
feedback.userAlreadyExists: This email is already registered. Please sign in directly.
feedback.resetEmailAlreadySent: A reset email was already sent recently. Please check your inbox and try again later.
feedback.rateLimited: Too many attempts in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

prompts.confirmRelease: Continue with version update and tag creation?
prompts.pushNow: Push commit and tag to remote now?

messages.invalidChoice: Invalid choice, defaulting to patch release.
messages.pushSkipped: Skipped push. You can push later with:

errors.cargoVersionNotFound: Failed to locate version in Cargo.toml
errors.cargoPackageNameNotFound: Failed to locate package name in Cargo.toml
errors.cargoLockVersionNotFound: Failed to locate version in Cargo.lock
errors.releaseStagingIncomplete: Release staging is incomplete. Staged files: {{stagedFiles}}
errors.workingTreeNotClean: Working tree is not clean. Please commit or stash your changes first.
errors.remoteTagExists: Remote tag {{tag}} already exists on origin.
errors.branchNotMain: Releases must be created from the main branch. Current branch: {{branch}}
errors.versionMismatch: Version mismatch detected. package.json={{packageVersion}}, tauri.conf.json={{tauriVersion}}, Cargo.toml={{cargoVersion}}, Cargo.lock={{cargoLockVersion}}
errors.packageVersionInvalid: package.json version is missing or invalid
errors.tauriVersionInvalid: src-tauri/tauri.conf.json version is missing or invalid
errors.invalidLang: Invalid --lang value. Use zh or en.
